summary:
NATIONAL SECURITY AND THE SIGNIFICANCE OF THE EIGHTEENTH: Brandon highlights the significance of the 18th, a date he was instructed to focus on regarding national safety. He mentions a lack of anticipated attacks at events like Coachella and the Boston Marathon, but maintains that critical, unseen developments are occurring behind closed doors, specifically involving potential major storms and decisions regarding Iran.

DRUG CARTELS AND CHILD TRAFFICKING: Brandon clarifies previous statements regarding cartel leadership, stating that while earlier reports of a leader's elimination were premature, he maintains his vision that cartel leaders will eventually be taken out by mercenaries or special forces like Navy SEALs. He emphasizes that child trafficking and drug smuggling operations across the border will be dismantled.

IRANIAN CONFLICT AND NUCLEAR INTELLIGENCE: Brandon relays reports and visions concerning military tensions with Iran. He references claims from a former CIA analyst about a tense White House meeting where President Trump and a military general debated using nuclear options against Iran. He details visions of specialized planes, referred to as sniffers, patrolling areas like Cuba and Miami for radioactive materials. Furthermore, Brandon describes a vision of a red, black, and white Trojan horse cargo ship carrying a radioactive device intended for an attack on an American harbor.

MIDDLE EAST BLOCKADES AND UNDERGROUND NUCLEAR FACILITIES: Brandon discusses the U.S. Navy's blockade of Iranian ports, mentioning specific warships intercepting vessels carrying dual-use chemicals from China intended for ballistic missiles. He describes visions of Iranian nuclear materials, including highly enriched uranium and a specific black missile intended for Israel, hidden in deep subterranean facilities beneath Pickaxe Mountain and Fordow. He outlines a military plan involving deep-ground infiltration by special operations forces to neutralize these nuclear threats, drawing parallels to historical covert extractions like Project Sapphire in Kazakhstan.

GLOBAL ENERGY CRISIS AND OIL INFRASTRUCTURE SABOTAGE: Brandon warns of an impending global energy crisis reminiscent of the 1970s, characterized by severe gas lines and inflation. He points to recent unexplained explosions at a Romanian heating plant and an Indian oil refinery as evidence of targeted sabotage. He lists specific U.S. oil infrastructure, including facilities in Tuttle, Houston, Louisiana, and Gulf pipelines, warning that they are potential targets for drone attacks and sabotage. Additionally, he mentions the possibility of America becoming the world's primary oil capital, utilizing resources from Venezuela, Greenland, and a newly commercialized Cuba.

GLOBAL SHAKINGS AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon recounts visions of catastrophic natural disasters along the Ring of Fire. He describes a massive earthquake in Japan that could fracture the landmass and trigger a deadly eruption of Mount Fuji. He also details a vision of an 8.2 magnitude earthquake striking Italy, causing severe damage to the Vatican and surrounding areas, which he associates with an underwater volcanic eruption.

GOVERNMENTAL MOLES AND GEOPOLITICAL ALLIANCES: Brandon claims there are internal leaks and moles within the U.S. government, including the Supreme Court and the broader intelligence apparatus. He specifically mentions hidden backdoors in computer systems and geopolitical maneuvers involving China, Taiwan, North Korea, and Pakistan. He warns of underground deals and secret aid being provided to adversarial nations, leading to further international instability.
rawData: [April 21, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/yPdEFEDVsic]-[Good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again today. Let's go ahead and get right into the news. We have a job to do as the body of Christ. I truly believe God has assembled some of the greatest prayer warriors this generation has ever seen before for such a time as this. Just for this channel alone, I'm believing that he's bringing all the prayer warriors—the ones that are mature and the ones that are learning. I'm so thankful for every single one of you, for many hands make light work. I still go back to the 18th. You need to pray over this day." Well, we saw four major shootings and things like that across the world, but as I've prayed, I said, "Lord, was that it?" No, there's much more about the 18th that you don't know that you were praying about that was very significant. Now, I want you to really think about this because that day shook me inside as I interceded all night on the 17th going into the 18th. When we got to the 18th that evening, I told Diana, "I feel such a heaviness. There's something about this day. I just can't shake it." At that time, I didn't know if it was about the young girls at Coachella, praying for sex trafficking and protection for these kids for a mass shooting event or something. Even today, praying over the Boston Marathon, it went without a hitch. There was no—from what I can see—even an inkling of any kind of attack or terrorist plot. I prayed for countless hours for the safety of the runners and for the marathon to go, and I'm so thankful that we didn't see anything. I still feel an urgency inside; it didn't scratch the itch. There's something more to what we're hearing and what we're seeing. As we come up against the 20th, what is truly going on underneath the surface of everything? It's something that we are not seeing; it's something behind closed doors. This is a lot bigger than what you'll ever realize. As I came to it last night and we were interceding for the nations—interceding for President Trump specifically and the decisions he's making concerning Iran in the next 48 hours for Monday, Tuesday, and Wednesday—praying for this next bit of time for all of us to come together and pray over this. I want to show you what we have learned today that goes along with what the Lord showed us about the 18th. These are people that Braden found. Now, I want to correct this: we were wrong about the cartel and the leader of the cartel. There's a lot of people saying, "Brandon, you read the article wrong." So we're back to the drawing board praying for these leaders of the cartel. Are we there yet? Obviously, maybe not. But it doesn't mean it's not coming. I know in my spirit and in my opinion that the Lord is going to deliver the trafficking of these children and the drug smuggling in these areas, and the children will be saved. I stand behind what I pray. I'm praying that God is going to set these kids free. The anger of the Lord is on those that touch the children, trafficking them across the border into this highway of perversion. I believe with all my heart the Lord's not going to stand by idly and just watch that happen. We're standing, praying for them to be caught. This has gone on long enough. So, I'm still believing that regardless if the cartel leaders were taken out now, they will be. The other part was Stargate and the things we saw last night. There's a lot of dark stuff there. I don't like going down that dark path; it's heavy and demonic. But I want to show you what was said in meetings about the 18th. Play this little clip, Braden. Former CIA analyst Larry Johnson. Listen to what this former CIA analyst says about the 18th. There was a report that they had an emergency meeting Saturday night. This man right here, this general, stood against him and they had a huge argument. He's leaving the White House after the meeting. Now, that's the rumor. Like I said, a rumor. Remember, I kept saying, "I see a storm coming. A major storm. What is this?" And this general is walking out of the meeting. They say he's walking away and him and Trump just had an argument.
